Ruturaj Gaikwad Century Powers India A to 4-Wicket Win

Nov 14, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ruturaj Gaikwad Century Powers India A to 4-Wicket Win

Young batter Ruturaj Gaikwad smashed a commanding century as India A secured a dramatic 4-wicket win, highlighting his readiness for higher honours.
